steamDrm.note: Mirror's Edge (2008) is Steam CEG (per-user AES-256 encrypted exe). CEG can only be decrypted by a genuine logged-in Valve client; Goldberg/Steamless cannot. Route to GameNative's HEADLESS bionic-Steam path (real libsteamclient.so + JavaSteam token, no Steam window) — the GameHub-equivalent. Applied set-once; the container's DRM settings still win afterward. Falls back to real_steam if bionic is unavailable on the device.
